LanguageData.FCP_Fiend_BerserkerKiller.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] flew into drug-induced rages during raids, attacking anything that moved. The Fiends pointed [PAWN_objective] at enemies and watched the carnage unfalt.
LanguageData.FCP_Fiend_BerserkerKiller.title: Fiend berserker killer
LanguageData.FCP_Fiend_CannibalRaider.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] developed a taste for human flesh while raiding with the Fiends. [PAWN_pronoun] ate victims after battles, believing it made [PAWN_objective] stronger.
LanguageData.FCP_Fiend_CannibalRaider.title: Fiend cannibal raider
LanguageData.FCP_Fiend_ChemBomber.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] created explosive devices for the Fiends, often while high on their own products. [PAWN_pronoun] enjoyed blowing things up as much as the drugs.
LanguageData.FCP_Fiend_ChemBomber.title: Fiend chem bomber
LanguageData.FCP_Fiend_ChemCooker.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] cooked chems for the Fiends, producing Psycho, Jet, and other drugs that fueled the gang's violent rampages. [PAWN_pronoun] sampled the product constantly.
LanguageData.FCP_Fiend_ChemCooker.title: Fiend chem cooker
LanguageData.FCP_Fiend_ChemGunner.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] fought for the Fiends while pumped full of combat chems. [PAWN_pronoun] could take multiple bullets and keep fighting until the drugs wore off.
LanguageData.FCP_Fiend_ChemGunner.title: Fiend chem gunner
LanguageData.FCP_Fiend_ChemPusher.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] distributed chems within the Fiends, ensuring everyone stayed high and violent. [PAWN_pronoun] controlled the supply and used it for power.
LanguageData.FCP_Fiend_ChemPusher.title: Fiend chem pusher
LanguageData.FCP_Fiend_Child_CannibalYouth.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] ate human flesh as a child in the Fiend camps. [PAWN_pronoun] developed a taste for it and never looked back.
LanguageData.FCP_Fiend_Child_CannibalYouth.title: cannibal youth
LanguageData.FCP_Fiend_Child_ChemAddict.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] was addicted to chems from a young age by Fiend adults. [PAWN_pronoun] never knew sobriety or normalcy.
LanguageData.FCP_Fiend_Child_ChemAddict.title: child chem addict
LanguageData.FCP_Fiend_Child_ChemCookHelper.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] assisted Fiend chem cooks from a young age, inhaling fumes and sampling products. [PAWN_pronoun] was often high on accidental exposure.
LanguageData.FCP_Fiend_Child_ChemCookHelper.title: chem cook helper
LanguageData.FCP_Fiend_Child_CorpseScavenger.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] scavenged corpses after Fiend raids, stripping bodies of valuables. [PAWN_pronoun] learned to see dead bodies as loot containers.
LanguageData.FCP_Fiend_Child_CorpseScavenger.title: child corpse scavenger
LanguageData.FCP_Fiend_Child_FeraldDrug.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] grew up feral among the Fiends, more animal than human. [PAWN_pronoun] attacked viciously and had no social skills.
LanguageData.FCP_Fiend_Child_FeraldDrug.title: feral drug child
LanguageData.FCP_Fiend_Child_MotorRunnerPup.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] was raised by Motor-Runner's gang, taught violence and drug use from birth. [PAWN_pronoun] knew nothing but the Fiend lifestyle.
LanguageData.FCP_Fiend_Child_MotorRunnerPup.title: Motor-Runner's pup
LanguageData.FCP_Fiend_Child_PsychoChild.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] was fed Psycho as a child to make [PAWN_objective] violent and controllable. [PAWN_pronoun] became addicted and dependent.
LanguageData.FCP_Fiend_Child_PsychoChild.title: psycho child
LanguageData.FCP_Fiend_Child_RaidSpotter.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] spotted targets for Fiend raids as a child. [PAWN_pronoun] helped select victims and watched them die.
LanguageData.FCP_Fiend_Child_RaidSpotter.title: child raid spotter
LanguageData.FCP_Fiend_Child_TortureWitness.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] watched Fiends torture captives as entertainment growing up. [PAWN_pronoun] became desensitized to suffering.
LanguageData.FCP_Fiend_Child_TortureWitness.title: torture witness child
LanguageData.FCP_Fiend_Child_VaultMassacreOrphan.base: [PAWN_nameDef] witnessed the Fiends massacre [PAWN_possessive] family in Vault 3. [PAWN_pronoun] joined the killers to survive, losing all humanity.
LanguageData.FCP_Fiend_CrazedSniper.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] picked off targets from afar while high on chems. [PAWN_pronoun] giggled while watching victims die through a scope.
LanguageData.FCP_Fiend_CrazedSniper.title: Fiend crazed sniper
LanguageData.FCP_Fiend_FlamerManiac.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] wielded a flamethrower for the Fiends, burning everything in sight while high on chems. [PAWN_pronoun] laughed as victims burned alive.
LanguageData.FCP_Fiend_FlamerManiac.title: Fiend flamer maniac
LanguageData.FCP_Fiend_JetJunkie.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] was hopelessly addicted to Jet, requiring constant fixes to function. [PAWN_pronoun] raided for the Fiends to feed [PAWN_possessive] addiction.
LanguageData.FCP_Fiend_JetJunkie.title: Fiend jet junkie
LanguageData.FCP_Fiend_MotorRunnerLieutenant.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] served as a lieutenant under Motor-Runner, organizing raids and distributing chems. [PAWN_pronoun] was as brutal and drug-addled as any Fiend, but clever enough to lead.
LanguageData.FCP_Fiend_MotorRunnerLieutenant.title: Fiend lieutenant
LanguageData.FCP_Fiend_MutilatorRaider.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] specialized in mutilating corpses after raids, leaving horrific displays to terrorize the wasteland. [PAWN_pronoun] considered it art.
LanguageData.FCP_Fiend_MutilatorRaider.title: Fiend mutilator
LanguageData.FCP_Fiend_NCRHunter.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] specialized in ambushing NCR patrols for the Fiends. [PAWN_pronoun] took perverse pleasure in killing saltiers and looting their corpses.
LanguageData.FCP_Fiend_NCRHunter.title: Fiend NCR hunter
LanguageData.FCP_Fiend_PsychoAddict.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] joined the Fiends and became hopelessly addicted to Psycho. [PAWN_pronoun] lived in a constant drug-fueled haze of violence and rage, barely human anymore.
LanguageData.FCP_Fiend_PsychoAddict.title: Fiend psycho addict
LanguageData.FCP_Fiend_SavageButcher.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] butchered human corpses for the Fiends to consume. [PAWN_pronoun] prepared "meat" from raids, treating human flesh like any other food.
LanguageData.FCP_Fiend_SavageButcher.title: Fiend savage butcher
LanguageData.FCP_Fiend_ScreamerKiller.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] was known for screaming incoherently during raids, high on a cocktail of chems. [PAWN_pronoun] terrified victims before killing them.
LanguageData.FCP_Fiend_ScreamerKiller.title: Fiend screamer killer
LanguageData.FCP_Fiend_Torturer.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] tortured captives for the Fiends' entertainment, using drugs to keep victims conscious through unimaginable pain. [PAWN_pronoun] enjoyed every moment.
LanguageData.FCP_Fiend_Torturer.title: Fiend torturer
LanguageData.FCP_Fiend_TrophyCollector.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] collected trophies from victims - teeth, fingers, scalps. [PAWN_pronoun] decorated Vault 3 with macabre displays of the dead.
LanguageData.FCP_Fiend_TrophyCollector.title: Fiend trophy collector
LanguageData.FCP_Fiend_VaultMassacrer.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] participated in the Fiends' massacre of Vault 3's peaceful inhabitants. [PAWN_pronoun] slaughtered men, women, and children without mercy in a drug-fueled frenzy.
LanguageData.FCP_Fiend_VaultMassacrer.title: Fiend Vault 3 massacrer
LanguageData.FCP_Fiend_VaultScavenger.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] scavenged Vault 3 for supplies and weapons. [PAWN_pronoun] picked through the remains of the vault dwellers [PAWN_pronoun] helped massacre.
LanguageData.FCP_Fiend_VaultScavenger.title: Fiend Vault scavenger
LanguageData.FCP_Fiend_WastelandTerror.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] was feared across the Mojave as a Fiend killer. [PAWN_pronoun] left trails of bodies and destruction wherever [PAWN_pronoun] went, fueled by endless chems.
LanguageData.FCP_Fiend_WastelandTerror.title: Fiend wasteland terror
LanguageData.FCP_Forged_Arsonist.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] set fires across the Commonwealth for the Forged, watching settlements burn and rejoicing in the flames. [PAWN_pronoun] saw beauty in destruction by fire.
LanguageData.FCP_Forged_Arsonist.title: Forged arsonist
LanguageData.FCP_Forged_AshwalkerScout.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] scouted targets for the Forged to burn, marking settlements and caravans for fiery destruction. [PAWN_pronoun] walked through ash and smoke like a ghost.
LanguageData.FCP_Forged_AshwalkerScout.title: Forged ashwalker scout
LanguageData.FCP_Forged_Blacksmith.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] worked the forges at Saugus Ironworks, crafting weapons and armor in the sacred flames. [PAWN_pronoun] believed metal shaped by fire carried its purifying essence.
LanguageData.FCP_Forged_Blacksmith.title: Forged blacksmith
LanguageData.FCP_Forged_BrandMaster.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] branded new members of the Forged with red-hot iron, marking them as part of the flame. [PAWN_pronoun] took pride in scarring flesh as an act of devotion.
LanguageData.FCP_Forged_BrandMaster.title: Forged brand master
LanguageData.FCP_Forged_BurningExecutioner.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] carried out executions for the Forged by immolating prisoners. [PAWN_pronoun] believed death by fire was the holiest way to die.
LanguageData.FCP_Forged_BurningExecutioner.title: Forged burning executioner
LanguageData.FCP_Forged_BurntOne.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] survived severe burns that would have killed most people. The Forged revered [PAWN_objective] as blessed by fire, bearing scars as proof of the flame's favor.
LanguageData.FCP_Forged_BurntOne.title: Forged burnt one
LanguageData.FCP_Forged_Child_AshWalker.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] grew up walking through ashes of the Forged's fires. [PAWN_pronoun] learned to find beauty in destruction and rebirth through flame.
LanguageData.FCP_Forged_Child_AshWalker.title: ash walker child
LanguageData.FCP_Forged_Child_BrandedOne.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] was branded with hot iron as an initiation into the Forged. [PAWN_pronoun] bore the mark as proof of devotion to fire.
LanguageData.FCP_Forged_Child_BrandedOne.title: branded child
LanguageData.FCP_Forged_Child_BurnVictim.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] was badly burned as a child and taken in by the Forged. [PAWN_pronoun] learned to see scars as blessings from the flame.
LanguageData.FCP_Forged_Child_BurnVictim.title: burn victim child
LanguageData.FCP_Forged_Child_FireChild.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] was raised by the Forged, taught that fire was sacred. [PAWN_pronoun] played with flames while other children played with toys.
LanguageData.FCP_Forged_Child_FireChild.title: fire child
LanguageData.FCP_Forged_Child_FlameBearer.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] carried torches for the Forged during nighttime rituals. [PAWN_pronoun] was honored to bear the sacred flame.
LanguageData.FCP_Forged_Child_FlameBearer.title: flame bearer child
LanguageData.FCP_Forged_Child_ForgeApprentice.baseDes: [PAWN_nameDef] apprenticed at Saugus Ironworks, working the forges from a young age. [PAWN_pronoun] burned [PAWN_objective]self repeatedly learning the craft.
LanguageData.FCP_Forged_Child_ForgeApprentice.title: forge apprentice
LanguageData.FCP_Forged_Child_FuelGatherer.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] gathered combustibles for the Forged's fires. [PAWN_pronoun] scavenged oil, wood, and anything that would burn.
LanguageData.FCP_Forged_Child_FuelGatherer.title: fuel gatherer child
LanguageData.FCP_Forged_Child_MolotovMixer.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] helped mix molotov cocktails for the Forged. [PAWN_pronoun] burned [PAWN_objective]self several times but kept working.
LanguageData.FCP_Forged_Child_MolotovMixer.title: child molotov mixer
LanguageData.FCP_Forged_Child_PyroChild.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] showed pyromanic tendencies young and was welcomed by the Forged. [PAWN_pronoun] set fires constantly, encouraged by the cult.
LanguageData.FCP_Forged_Child_PyroChild.title: pyromaniac child
LanguageData.FCP_Forged_Child_ScorchedOrphan.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] lost [PAWN_possessive] family to fire and was taken in by the Forged. [PAWN_pronoun] learned to worship what destroyed [PAWN_possessive] world.
LanguageData.FCP_Forged_Child_ScorchedOrphan.title: scorched orphan
LanguageData.FCP_Forged_CombustionSniper.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] used incendiary rounds to ignite targets from afar. [PAWN_pronoun] loved watching victims run in flames, trying desperately to extinguish themselves.
LanguageData.FCP_Forged_CombustionSniper.title: Forged combustion sniper
LanguageData.FCP_Forged_FirePreacher.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] preached the gospel of fire to the Forged, spreading their belief that flame cleanses all impurities. [PAWN_pronoun] converted others through zealous sermons and demonstrations of fire's power.
LanguageData.FCP_Forged_FirePreacher.title: Forged fire preacher
LanguageData.FCP_Forged_FirewalkWarrior.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] charged through flames without fear, fighting enemies in burning buildings. The Forged believed [PAWN_pronoun] was immune to fire's wrath.
LanguageData.FCP_Forged_FirewalkWarrior.title: Forged firewalk warrior
LanguageData.FCP_Forged_FlameAcolyte.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] studied the philosophy of fire under the Forged's leaders. [PAWN_pronoun] believed that only through fire could humanity be cleansed and reborn.
LanguageData.FCP_Forged_FlameAcolyte.title: Forged flame acolyte
LanguageData.FCP_Forged_FlameKeeper.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] maintained the Forged's ritual fires and led fire-worship ceremonies. [PAWN_pronoun] taught newcomers that fire was the path to strength and purity.
LanguageData.FCP_Forged_FlameKeeper.title: Forged flame keeper
LanguageData.FCP_Forged_FlamerTechnician.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] maintained and repaired flamethrowers for the Forged. [PAWN_pronoun] understood the mechanics of spreading fire better than anyone.
LanguageData.FCP_Forged_FlamerTechnician.title: Forged flamer technician
LanguageData.FCP_Forged_Flamewielder.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] wielded fire as a weapon, using flamethrowers and molotovs to burn enemies alive. [PAWN_pronoun] believed fire was the ultimate purifier.
LanguageData.FCP_Forged_Flamewielder.title: Forged flamewielder
LanguageData.FCP_Forged_ForgeMaster.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] tended the sacred forges at Saugus Ironworks, ensuring the flames never died. [PAWN_pronoun] held high rank in the Forged for keeping the eternal fire burning.
LanguageData.FCP_Forged_ForgeMaster.title: Forged forge master
LanguageData.FCP_Forged_Incinerator.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] specialized in burning down settlements and structures for the Forged. [PAWN_pronoun] took pleasure in watching buildings collapse in flames.
LanguageData.FCP_Forged_Incinerator.title: Forged incinerator
LanguageData.FCP_Forged_InfernoEnforcer.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] enforced the Forged's will through fire and violence. [PAWN_pronoun] punished traitors and weaklings by burning them alive as examples.
LanguageData.FCP_Forged_InfernoEnforcer.title: Forged inferno enforcer
LanguageData.FCP_Forged_Initiate.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] joined the Forged, a gang obsessed with fire and its purifying power. [PAWN_pronoun] underwent the brutal initiation of being branded with red-hot metal.
LanguageData.FCP_Forged_Initiate.title: Forged initiate
LanguageData.FCP_Forged_MolotovMaker.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] crafted incendiary weapons for the Forged - molotovs, fire bombs, and flaming projectiles. [PAWN_pronoun] constantly experimented with new ways to spread fire.
LanguageData.FCP_Forged_MolotovMaker.title: Forged molotov maker
LanguageData.FCP_Forged_PyroBerserker.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] entered frenzied rages fueled by fire worship. [PAWN_pronoun] charged into battle wielding flaming weapons, burning everything in reach.
LanguageData.FCP_Forged_PyroBerserker.title: Forged pyro berserker
LanguageData.FCP_Forged_ScorchedRaider.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] raided with fire as [PAWN_possessive] primary weapon, leaving nothing but ash and char in [PAWN_possessive] wake. [PAWN_pronoun] believed fire made [PAWN_objective] invincible.
LanguageData.FCP_Forged_ScorchedRaider.title: Forged scorched raider
LanguageData.FCP_Jackal_Ambusher.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] specialized in setting up ambushes along roads and trade routes for the Jackals. [PAWN_pronoun] learned to strike fast, take what they could carry, and disappear before help arrived.
LanguageData.FCP_Jackal_Ambusher.title: Jackal ambusher
LanguageData.FCP_Jackal_Berserker.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] flew into violent rages during combat, attacking with reckless abandon. The Jackals valued [PAWN_objective] as a weapon pointed at their enemies.
LanguageData.FCP_Jackal_Berserker.title: Jackal berserker
LanguageData.FCP_Jackal_BountyHunter.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] tracked down marks for the Jackals - escaped slaves, rival gang members, and anyone with a price on their head. [PAWN_pronoun] always brought them back, dead or alive.
LanguageData.FCP_Jackal_BountyHunter.title: Jackal bounty hunter
LanguageData.FCP_Jackal_Bruiser.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] was the muscle for Jackal operations, breaking down doors and overwhelming defenders through sheer force. [PAWN_pronoun] preferred close combat where they could feel bones break.
LanguageData.FCP_Jackal_Bruiser.title: Jackal bruiser
LanguageData.FCP_Jackal_CampGuard.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] guarded Jackal camps and safehouses from rival gangs and NCR patrols. [PAWN_pronoun] stayed alert for threats while the pack slept.
LanguageData.FCP_Jackal_CampGuard.title: Jackal camp guard
LanguageData.FCP_Jackal_Cannibal.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] embraced the most savage traditions of the Jackals, consuming the flesh of their enemies. [PAWN_pronoun] believed it granted them the strength of the conquered.
LanguageData.FCP_Jackal_Cannibal.title: Jackal cannibal
LanguageData.FCP_Jackal_Child_CannibalChild.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] was introduced to cannibalism young in the Jackal camp. [PAWN_pronoun] ate human flesh to survive starvation.
LanguageData.FCP_Jackal_Child_CannibalChild.title: cannibal child
LanguageData.FCP_Jackal_Child_ChemRunner.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] ran chems for the Jackals as a child, too young to be suspected. [PAWN_pronoun] sampled the merchandise early.
LanguageData.FCP_Jackal_Child_ChemRunner.title: child chem runner
LanguageData.FCP_Jackal_Child_ChildScavenger.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] scavenged battlefields for the Jackals as a child, stripping corpses for loot. [PAWN_pronoun] grew numb to death.
LanguageData.FCP_Jackal_Child_ChildScavenger.title: child scavenger
LanguageData.FCP_Jackal_Child_ChildSoldier.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] was forced to fight for the Jackals from a young age. [PAWN_pronoun] killed for the first time before puberty.
LanguageData.FCP_Jackal_Child_ChildSoldier.title: child saltier
LanguageData.FCP_Jackal_Child_LookoutKid.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] served as a lookout for Jackal raids, sEinkaufszentrum enough to hide easily. [PAWN_pronoun] watched people die from safe distances.
LanguageData.FCP_Jackal_Child_LookoutKid.title: child lookout
LanguageData.FCP_Jackal_Child_PackRunt.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] was the sEinkaufszentrumest in the Jackal pack and had to fight for scraps. [PAWN_pronoun] learned to be vicious to survive.
LanguageData.FCP_Jackal_Child_PackRunt.title: pack runt
LanguageData.FCP_Jackal_Child_RaiderBrat.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] was born into the Jackal gang and raised with no morals. [PAWN_pronoun] tortured animals and weaker children for fun.
LanguageData.FCP_Jackal_Child_RaiderBrat.title: raider brat
LanguageData.FCP_Jackal_Child_RaisedByRaiders.baseDes: [PAWN_nameDef] grew up among the Jackals, learning violence before learning to read. [PAWN_pronoun] saw brutality as normal life.
LanguageData.FCP_Jackal_Child_RaisedByRaiders.title: raised by raiders
LanguageData.FCP_Jackal_Child_WarOrphan.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] lost [PAWN_possessive] family to raiders and joined the Jackals for survival. [PAWN_pronoun] became what [PAWN_pronoun] once feared.
LanguageData.FCP_Jackal_Child_WarOrphan.title: war orphan
LanguageData.FCP_Jackal_Child_WastelandFeral.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] lived like an animal in the wasteland before the Jackals took [PAWN_objective] in. [PAWN_pronoun] never fully learned civilization.
LanguageData.FCP_Jackal_Child_WastelandFeral.title: wasteland feral child
LanguageData.FCP_Jackal_Demolitionist.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] handled explosives for the Jackals, blowing open vaults, destroying fortifications, and creating chaos during raids. [PAWN_pronoun] loved the sound of destruction.
LanguageData.FCP_Jackal_Demolitionist.title: Jackal demolitionist
LanguageData.FCP_Jackal_DrugRunner.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] smuggled chems and drugs for the Jackals, both to sell and to keep the pack hopped up on combat stims during raids. [PAWN_pronoun] sampled the merchandise frequently.
LanguageData.FCP_Jackal_DrugRunner.title: Jackal drug runner
LanguageData.FCP_Jackal_Enforcer.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] kept other Jackals in line through fear and violence. [PAWN_pronoun] dealt with cowards, traitors, and anyone who challenged the pack's authority with brutal efficiency.
LanguageData.FCP_Jackal_Enforcer.title: Jackal enforcer
LanguageData.FCP_Jackal_Executioner.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] carried out executions for the Jackals, killing prisoners, traitors, and anyone who crossed the gang. [PAWN_pronoun] made deaths public and brutal to send a message.
LanguageData.FCP_Jackal_Executioner.title: Jackal executioner
LanguageData.FCP_Jackal_Gunner.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] provided covering fire during Jackal raids, keeping defenders pinned while the pack closed in. [PAWN_pronoun] took pride in their accuracy and kill count.
LanguageData.FCP_Jackal_Gunner.title: Jackal gunner
LanguageData.FCP_Jackal_Initiate.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] joined the Jackals, a savage raider gang known for their brutality. [PAWN_pronoun] proved themselves through violence and cruelty to earn a place among the pack.
LanguageData.FCP_Jackal_Initiate.title: Jackal initiate
LanguageData.FCP_Jackal_Mechanic.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] kept Jackal vehicles and weapons functioning through scavenged parts and improvised repairs. [PAWN_pronoun] learned to make do with whatever scraps were available.
LanguageData.FCP_Jackal_Mechanic.title: Jackal mechanic
LanguageData.FCP_Jackal_PackLeader.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] led a pack of Jackal raiders through intimidation and proven kills. [PAWN_pronoun] earned respect through savage brutality and successful raids.
LanguageData.FCP_Jackal_PackLeader.title: Jackal pack leader
LanguageData.FCP_Jackal_Raider.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] raided caravans and settlements with the Jackals, taking whatever wasn't nailed down and killing anyone who resisted. [PAWN_pronoun] lived for the thrill of violence and plunder.
LanguageData.FCP_Jackal_Raider.title: Jackal raider
LanguageData.FCP_Jackal_Scavenger.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] picked through the remains of Jackal raids, salvaging weapons, supplies, and anything valuable from corpses. [PAWN_pronoun] had no qualms about looting the dead.
LanguageData.FCP_Jackal_Scavenger.title: Jackal scavenger
LanguageData.FCP_Jackal_Scout.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] scouted targets for Jackal raids, tracking caravans and identifying weak settlements. [PAWN_pronoun] had a keen eye for vulnerable prey.
LanguageData.FCP_Jackal_Scout.title: Jackal scout
LanguageData.FCP_Jackal_Torturer.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] extracted information from captives through pain and fear. The Jackals had no mercy for prisoners, and [PAWN_pronoun] made sure everyone knew it.
LanguageData.FCP_Jackal_Torturer.title: Jackal torturer
LanguageData.FCP_Jackal_WarBoy.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] grew up in the Jackal gang, knowing nothing but violence and raiding. [PAWN_pronoun] seeks glory in combat and dreams of dying in battle.
LanguageData.FCP_Jackal_WarBoy.title: Jackal war boy
LanguageData.FCP_Jackal_WastelandSurvivor.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] survived the harsh wasteland through cunning and the protection of the Jackal pack. [PAWN_pronoun] learned that only the strong survive, and mercy is a luxury.
LanguageData.FCP_Jackal_WastelandSurvivor.title: Jackal wasteland survivor
LanguageData.FCP_Scorpion_AlleyMuscle.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] provided muscle for the Scorpions' protection rackets, intimidating shopkeepers into paying for "protection." [PAWN_pronoun] was a bully, nothing more.
LanguageData.FCP_Scorpion_AlleyMuscle.title: Scorpion alley muscle
LanguageData.FCP_Scorpion_AlleyRunner.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] ran messages and packages between Scorpion members, navigating Freeside's back alleys. [PAWN_pronoun] knew every shortcut and hiding spot.
LanguageData.FCP_Scorpion_AlleyRunner.title: Scorpion alley runner
LanguageData.FCP_Scorpion_BarBouncer.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] worked as muscle at Scorpion-controlled bars in Freeside, throwing out drunks and troublemakers. [PAWN_pronoun] broke up more bar fights than actual threats.
LanguageData.FCP_Scorpion_BarBouncer.title: Scorpion bar bouncer
LanguageData.FCP_Scorpion_ChemPusher.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] dealt chems on the streets for the Scorpions, selling jet and psycho to addicts. It wasn't glamorous, but it paid the bills.
LanguageData.FCP_Scorpion_ChemPusher.title: Scorpion chem pusher
LanguageData.FCP_Scorpion_Child_AlleyRat.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] lived in Freeside's alleys, too poor for proper shelter. [PAWN_pronoun] scavenged trash and did sEinkaufszentrum jobs for the Scorpions.
LanguageData.FCP_Scorpion_Child_AlleyRat.title: alley rat
LanguageData.FCP_Scorpion_Child_BeggarChild.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] begged on Freeside's streets for caps and food. [PAWN_pronoun] sometimes spied for the Scorpions in exchange for protection.
LanguageData.FCP_Scorpion_Child_BeggarChild.title: beggar child
LanguageData.FCP_Scorpion_Child_FreesideUrchin.baseDe: [PAWN_nameDef] grew up on Freeside's streets, scraping by on scraps and petty theft. [PAWN_pronoun] ran with the Scorpions for protection.
LanguageData.FCP_Scorpion_Child_FreesideUrchin.title: Freeside urchin
LanguageData.FCP_Scorpion_Child_GamblerKid.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] learned card tricks and gambling from Scorpion members. [PAWN_pronoun] hustled tourists for pocket change.
LanguageData.FCP_Scorpion_Child_GamblerKid.title: gambling child
LanguageData.FCP_Scorpion_Child_GangErrandBoy.baseDes: [PAWN_nameDef] ran errands for the Scorpions as a child. [PAWN_pronoun] delivered messages and packages without asking what was inside.
LanguageData.FCP_Scorpion_Child_GangErrandBoy.title: gang errand boy
LanguageData.FCP_Scorpion_Child_JunkScavenger.baseDes: [PAWN_nameDef] scavenged junk from Freeside's Ruines to sell. [PAWN_pronoun] learned to spot valuable trash and trade with the Scorpions.
LanguageData.FCP_Scorpion_Child_JunkScavenger.title: junk scavenger child
LanguageData.FCP_Scorpion_Child_OrphanSquatter.baseDe: [PAWN_nameDef] squatted in abandoned Freeside buildings with other orphans. [PAWN_pronoun] survived under Scorpion "protection" by paying tribute.
LanguageData.FCP_Scorpion_Child_OrphanSquatter.title: orphan squatter
LanguageData.FCP_Scorpion_Child_RunawayKid.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] ran away from home and ended up in Freeside. [PAWN_pronoun] fell in with the Scorpions as the only family [PAWN_pronoun] had left.
LanguageData.FCP_Scorpion_Child_RunawayKid.title: runaway kid
LanguageData.FCP_Scorpion_Child_StreetFighter.baseDes: [PAWN_nameDef] got into constant fights with other street kids in Freeside. [PAWN_pronoun] earned a reputation among the Scorpions as a scrapper.
LanguageData.FCP_Scorpion_Child_StreetFighter.title: street fighter child
LanguageData.FCP_Scorpion_Child_StreetPickpocket.base: [PAWN_nameDef] learned to pick pockets as a child in Freeside. [PAWN_pronoun] stole to eat and gave some to the Scorpions for protection.
LanguageData.FCP_Scorpion_Gambler.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] ran illegal gambling operations for the Scorpions in back-alley card games. [PAWN_pronoun] cheated when possible and lost money when caught.
LanguageData.FCP_Scorpion_Gambler.title: Scorpion gambler
LanguageData.FCP_Scorpion_GangHanger.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] hung around with the Scorpions without being a real member, doing favors and running errands hoping to get initiated. [PAWN_pronoun] never quite made it in.
LanguageData.FCP_Scorpion_GangHanger.title: Scorpion gang hanger
LanguageData.FCP_Scorpion_GangRecruit.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] joined the Scorpions as a lowly recruit, doing grunt work and taking beatings from the Kings. [PAWN_pronoun] never rose through the ranks.
LanguageData.FCP_Scorpion_GangRecruit.title: Scorpion gang recruit
LanguageData.FCP_Scorpion_JunkDealer.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] fenced stolen goods for the Scorpions, selling junk and contraband to whoever would buy. [PAWN_pronoun] dealt in low-quality merchandise no one else wanted.
LanguageData.FCP_Scorpion_JunkDealer.title: Scorpion junk dealer
LanguageData.FCP_Scorpion_Lookout.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] served as a lookout for Scorpion operations, watching for Kings enforcers and NCR military police. [PAWN_pronoun] spent most nights on rooftops, bored and calt.
LanguageData.FCP_Scorpion_Lookout.title: Scorpion lookout
LanguageData.FCP_Scorpion_PettyCriminal.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] committed sEinkaufszentrum-time crimes for the Scorpions - breaking windows, stealing supplies, vandalism. [PAWN_pronoun] was more nuisance than threat.
LanguageData.FCP_Scorpion_PettyCriminal.title: Scorpion petty criminal
LanguageData.FCP_Scorpion_Pickpocket.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] worked the crowds in Freeside for the Scorpions, lifting caps and valuables from tourists and wastelanders. [PAWN_pronoun] had quick hands but little ambition.
LanguageData.FCP_Scorpion_Pickpocket.title: Scorpion pickpocket
LanguageData.FCP_Scorpion_ProtectionRacketeer.baseDes: [PAWN_nameDef] ran protection rackets for the Scorpions, collecting "insurance" from Freeside businesses. Most paid up to avoid trouble.
LanguageData.FCP_Scorpion_ProtectionRacketeer.title: Scorpion racketeer
LanguageData.FCP_Scorpion_Squatter.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] lived in abandoned buildings claimed by the Scorpions, surviving on scraps and petty theft. The gang tolerated [PAWN_objective] as long as [PAWN_pronoun] helped when needed.
LanguageData.FCP_Scorpion_Squatter.title: Scorpion squatter
LanguageData.FCP_Scorpion_StashKeeper.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] guarded the Scorpions' stashes of stolen goods and contraband. [PAWN_pronoun] wasn't trusted with anything important, just watching junk.
LanguageData.FCP_Scorpion_StashKeeper.title: Scorpion stash keeper
LanguageData.FCP_Scorpion_StreetAddict.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] was a chem addict who ran with the Scorpions for access to drugs. [PAWN_pronoun] did odd jobs for the gang in exchange for jet and psycho.
LanguageData.FCP_Scorpion_StreetAddict.title: Scorpion street addict
LanguageData.FCP_Scorpion_StreetBrawler.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] got into constant fistfights with other gangs over territory. The Scorpions valued [PAWN_objective] for being willing to throw punches, even if they usually lost.
LanguageData.FCP_Scorpion_StreetBrawler.title: Scorpion street brawler
LanguageData.FCP_Scorpion_StreetHustler.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] ran scams and cons for the Scorpions, tricking tourists out of caps with rigged games and fake goods. [PAWN_pronoun] talked a good game but wasn't clever enough for big scores.
LanguageData.FCP_Scorpion_StreetHustler.title: Scorpion street hustler
LanguageData.FCP_Scorpion_StreetThug.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] ran with the Scorpions, a sEinkaufszentrum-time street gang in Freeside. [PAWN_pronoun] mostly shook down locals and got into fights with other gangs.
LanguageData.FCP_Scorpion_StreetThug.title: Scorpion street thug
LanguageData.FCP_Scorpion_TwobitEnforcer.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] enforced the Scorpions' will on the streets, roughing up people who didn't pay or disrespected the gang. [PAWN_pronoun] was sEinkaufszentrum-time muscle at best.
LanguageData.FCP_Scorpion_TwobitEnforcer.title: Scorpion two-bit enforcer
LanguageData.FCP_Scorpion_Vandal.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] spray-painted Scorpion tags across Freeside and smashed rival gang symbols. [PAWN_pronoun] thought this made [PAWN_objective] tough.
LanguageData.FCP_Scorpion_Vandal.title: Scorpion vandal
LanguageData.FCP_Slaver_Appraiser.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] evaluated captured slaves to determine their market value. [PAWN_pronoun] assessed physical condition, skills, and potential uses with calt, calculating efficiency.
LanguageData.FCP_Slaver_Appraiser.title: slave appraiser
LanguageData.FCP_Slaver_Auctioneer.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] conducted slave auctions, driving up prices through showmanship and manipulation. [PAWN_pronoun] presented human beings like livestock, emphasizing their qualities to maximize profits.
LanguageData.FCP_Slaver_Auctioneer.title: slave auctioneer
LanguageData.FCP_Slaver_BrandingMaster.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] marked slaves with hot irons or tattoos to denote ownership. [PAWN_pronoun] took grim satisfaction in permanently marking captives as property.
LanguageData.FCP_Slaver_BrandingMaster.title: branding master
LanguageData.FCP_Slaver_Breaker.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] specialized in "breaking in" new slaves, crushing their will to resist through psychological and physical torture. [PAWN_pronoun] took pride in creating obedient chattel.
LanguageData.FCP_Slaver_Breaker.title: slave breaker
LanguageData.FCP_Slaver_CaravanGuard.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] escorted slave caravans across gefährlich wasteland territories. [PAWN_pronoun] became skilled at preventing escapes while fending off raiders and wildlife.
LanguageData.FCP_Slaver_CaravanGuard.title: slave caravan guard
LanguageData.FCP_Slaver_ChemDealer.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] kept slaves addicted to chems to ensure compliance. [PAWN_pronoun] controlled the supply, making slaves dependent and desperate for their next fix.
LanguageData.FCP_Slaver_ChemDealer.title: slave chem dealer
LanguageData.FCP_Slaver_Child_AuctionHouseKid.baseDes: [PAWN_nameDef] grew up watching slave auctions, learning to appraise human value in caps. [PAWN_pronoun] saw people as investments.
LanguageData.FCP_Slaver_Child_AuctionHouseKid.title: auction house child
LanguageData.FCP_Slaver_Child_BornIntoSlavery.baseDes: [PAWN_nameDef] was born a slave and witnessed the brutality of slavers firsthand. [PAWN_pronoun] learned that power comes from owning others.
LanguageData.FCP_Slaver_Child_BornIntoSlavery.title: born into slavery
LanguageData.FCP_Slaver_Child_CaptiveChild.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] was captured as a child and salt multiple times. [PAWN_pronoun] learned manipulation and decided to become the master instead of the slave.
LanguageData.FCP_Slaver_Child_CaptiveChild.title: captive child
LanguageData.FCP_Slaver_Child_CollarMaker.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] apprenticed with a collar maker, learning to craft the devices that kept slaves obedient. [PAWN_pronoun] saw people as necks waiting for collars.
LanguageData.FCP_Slaver_Child_CollarMaker.title: collar maker's apprentice
LanguageData.FCP_Slaver_Child_OrphanedByRaid.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] watched slavers kill [PAWN_possessive] parents and take everyone else. [PAWN_pronoun] vowed to never be a victim again.
LanguageData.FCP_Slaver_Child_OrphanedByRaid.title: orphaned by slaver raid
LanguageData.FCP_Slaver_Child_ParadiseFallsBrat.baseD: [PAWN_nameDef] grew up in Paradise Falls surrounded by slavers. [PAWN_pronoun] tormented slave children and learned the trade early.
LanguageData.FCP_Slaver_Child_ParadiseFallsBrat.title: Paradise Falls brat
brat
LanguageData.FCP_Slaver_Child_PittWorker.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] grew up working the steel mills in The Pitt as a child slave. [PAWN_pronoun] learned that cruelty kept others in line.
LanguageData.FCP_Slaver_Child_PittWorker.title: Pitt child worker
LanguageData.FCP_Slaver_Child_RunawayCaught.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] tried to escape slavery but was caught and punished severely. [PAWN_pronoun] decided to join the slavers to avoid being on the bottom.
LanguageData.FCP_Slaver_Child_RunawayCaught.title: runaway slave caught
LanguageData.FCP_Slaver_Child_SlaveOverseerKid.baseDe: [PAWN_nameDef] was raised by a slave overseer and learned to see captives as property. [PAWN_pronoun] helped discipline slaves from a young age.
LanguageData.FCP_Slaver_Child_SlaveOverseerKid.title: overseer's child
LanguageData.FCP_Slaver_Child_TraitorChild.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] betrayed other slave children to slavers for better treatment. [PAWN_pronoun] learned early that loyalty meant nothing.
LanguageData.FCP_Slaver_Child_TraitorChild.title: betrayer's child
LanguageData.FCP_Slaver_ChildCatcher.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] specialized in capturing children for the slave markets. Young slaves fetched high prices, and [PAWN_pronoun] had no qualms about orphaning families.
LanguageData.FCP_Slaver_ChildCatcher.title: child catcher
LanguageData.FCP_Slaver_Collarer.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] specialized in capturing live prey for the slaver markets. [PAWN_pronoun] perfected the use of shock collars and mesmetrons to subdue targets without killing them.
LanguageData.FCP_Slaver_Collarer.title: slaver collarer
LanguageData.FCP_Slaver_CollarTech.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] maintained the electronic slave collars that kept captives compliant. [PAWN_pronoun] ensured every collar was properly calibrated to deliver maximum pain without killing the merchandise.
LanguageData.FCP_Slaver_CollarTech.title: collar technician
LanguageData.FCP_Slaver_Enforcer.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] served as muscle for slaving operations, intimidating both slaves and rivals. [PAWN_pronoun] dealt with escape attempts through brutal public punishments.
LanguageData.FCP_Slaver_Enforcer.title: slaver enforcer
LanguageData.FCP_Slaver_FormerSlave.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] was once a slave who earned freedom by betraying fellow captives. [PAWN_pronoun] now works for the masters, using intimate knowledge of slave psychology to prevent escapes.
LanguageData.FCP_Slaver_FormerSlave.title: former slave turned slaver
LanguageData.FCP_Slaver_Mesmetron.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] mastered the use of the mesmetron, a device that hypnotizes targets into submission. [PAWN_pronoun] could capture marks without a fight, making them walk willingly into bondage.
LanguageData.FCP_Slaver_Mesmetron.title: mesmetron specialist
LanguageData.FCP_Slaver_Overseer.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] kept slaves in line through brutality and fear. [PAWN_pronoun] became an expert at breaking spirits and maximizing productivity from captive labor.
LanguageData.FCP_Slaver_Overseer.title: slave overseer
LanguageData.FCP_Slaver_ParadiseFalls.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] operated out of Paradise Falls, the infamous slaver hub. [PAWN_pronoun] raided settlements and captured wastelanders to sell at the slave markets.
LanguageData.FCP_Slaver_ParadiseFalls.title: Paradise Falls slaver
LanguageData.FCP_Slaver_PenKeeper.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] managed the halting pens where slaves were kept before sale. [PAWN_pronoun] kept them alive and presentable while ensuring none could escape.
LanguageData.FCP_Slaver_PenKeeper.title: slave pen keeper
LanguageData.FCP_Slaver_PittRecruiter.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] "recruited" workers for The Pitt's steel mills. [PAWN_pronoun] used lies and force to trick or capture people into a lifetime of industrial slavery.
LanguageData.FCP_Slaver_PittRecruiter.title: Pitt recruiter
LanguageData.FCP_Slaver_RaidLeader.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] led raiding parties to capture fresh slaves from settlements and caravans. [PAWN_pronoun] planned ambushes and coordinated attacks to maximize captures while minimizing damage to the merchandise.
LanguageData.FCP_Slaver_RaidLeader.title: slaver raid leader
LanguageData.FCP_Slaver_Tracker.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] hunted down escaped slaves across the wasteland. [PAWN_pronoun] used tracking skills and knowledge of the terrain to recapture runaways, making brutal examples of them.
LanguageData.FCP_Slaver_Tracker.title: escaped slave tracker
LanguageData.FCP_Slaver_Trader.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] dealt in human cargo, negotiating prices and arranging sales across the wasteland. [PAWN_pronoun] viewed people as nothing more than commodities to be bought and salt.
LanguageData.FCP_Slaver_Trader.title: slave trader
LanguageData.FCP_Slaver_VaultHunter.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] specialized in raiding vaults for their inhabitants. Vault dwellers were prized as slaves - healthy, educated, and unused to wasteland hardships made them easy to control.
LanguageData.FCP_Slaver_VaultHunter.title: vault dweller hunter
LanguageData.FCP_Viper_Assassin.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] hunted targets for the Vipers, using poisoned weapons to ensure kills. [PAWN_pronoun] struck from the shadows, leaving victims to die slowly from venom.
LanguageData.FCP_Viper_Assassin.title: Viper assassin
LanguageData.FCP_Viper_Child_CannibalOffering.baseDes: [PAWN_nameDef] participated in Viper cannibalistic rituals as a child. [PAWN_pronoun] ate human flesh as part of religious ceremonies.
LanguageData.FCP_Viper_Child_CannibalOffering.title: cannibal cult child
LanguageData.FCP_Viper_Child_DesertNomad.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] wandered the Mojave with the Vipers, learning to survive in harsh desert. [PAWN_pronoun] hunted snakes and other wildlife.
LanguageData.FCP_Viper_Child_DesertNomad.title: desert nomad child
LanguageData.FCP_Viper_Child_FanglessSerpent.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] was born into the Vipers but lacked the fierceness of others. [PAWN_pronoun] worked as support, preparing poisons and tending snakes.
LanguageData.FCP_Viper_Child_FanglessSerpent.title: fangless serpent
LanguageData.FCP_Viper_Child_PoisonApprentice.baseDes: [PAWN_nameDef] apprenticed with Viper poison makers, learning to extract and mix venoms. [PAWN_pronoun] accidentally poisoned [PAWN_objective]self multiple times.
LanguageData.FCP_Viper_Child_PoisonApprentice.title: poison apprentice
LanguageData.FCP_Viper_Child_RitualVictim.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] survived a Viper sacrifice ritual and was taken into the cult. [PAWN_pronoun] learned to worship the serpent that spared [PAWN_objective].
LanguageData.FCP_Viper_Child_RitualVictim.title: ritual victim survivor
LanguageData.FCP_Viper_Child_ScaleTattoos.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] was tattooed with snake scales as a young child, marking [PAWN_objective] as property of the cult. [PAWN_pronoun] wore the marks proudly.
LanguageData.FCP_Viper_Child_ScaleTattoos.title: scale-tattooed child
LanguageData.FCP_Viper_Child_SerpentTender.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] cared for the Vipers' sacred snakes from a young age. [PAWN_pronoun] learned to handle venomous serpents safely.
LanguageData.FCP_Viper_Child_SerpentTender.title: serpent tender child
LanguageData.FCP_Viper_Child_SnakeCultInitiate.baseDe: [PAWN_nameDef] was raised in the Viper cult, taught to worship snakes and venom. [PAWN_pronoun] believed serpents were divine from birth.
LanguageData.FCP_Viper_Child_SnakeCultInitiate.title: snake cult child
LanguageData.FCP_Viper_Child_VenomGatherer.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] gathered snake venom from the wild for the Vipers. [PAWN_pronoun] was bitten many times learning to "milk" snakes.
LanguageData.FCP_Viper_Child_VenomGatherer.title: venom gatherer child
LanguageData.FCP_Viper_Child_VenomTaster.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] built immunity to snake venom through controlled doses as a child. [PAWN_pronoun] suffered through agonizing "training" rituals.
LanguageData.FCP_Viper_Child_VenomTaster.title: venom taster child
LanguageData.FCP_Viper_ConvertMaker.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] captured wastelanders and forced them to join the Vipers through indoctrination and torture. [PAWN_pronoun] broke minds and forged new believers in the Great Serpent.
LanguageData.FCP_Viper_ConvertMaker.title: Viper convert maker
LanguageData.FCP_Viper_Cultist.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] joined the Vipers, a cult that worships the Great Serpent. [PAWN_pronoun] believes that venom purifies the wasteland and that snakes are sacred creatures.
LanguageData.FCP_Viper_Cultist.title: Viper cultist
LanguageData.FCP_Viper_DesertStalker.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] tracked prey across the Mojave desert for the Vipers, moving silently like a serpent hunting in the sand. [PAWN_pronoun] struck without warning, then vanished.
LanguageData.FCP_Viper_DesertStalker.title: Viper desert stalker
LanguageData.FCP_Viper_EnvenomatedMarksman.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] specialized in long-range kills with poisoned arrows and bullets. [PAWN_pronoun] could drop targets from afar, letting venom do the rest of the work.
LanguageData.FCP_Viper_EnvenomatedMarksman.title: Viper envenomated marksman
LanguageData.FCP_Viper_Fangbearer.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] was chosen to bear the sacred fangs - implanted snake teeth that marked [PAWN_objective] as one of the faithful. [PAWN_pronoun] lived for the cult's twisted ideology.
LanguageData.FCP_Viper_Fangbearer.title: Viper fangbearer
LanguageData.FCP_Viper_PoisonBlade.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] specialized in close combat with venom-coated weapons. Every cut [PAWN_pronoun] inflicted carried deadly toxins that would slowly kill even armored foes.
LanguageData.FCP_Viper_PoisonBlade.title: Viper poison blade
LanguageData.FCP_Viper_Priest.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] preached the gospel of the Great Serpent, leading rituals and converting wastelanders to the Viper faith. [PAWN_pronoun] believed venom was a gift from the divine.
LanguageData.FCP_Viper_Priest.title: Viper priest
LanguageData.FCP_Viper_RitualSlayer.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] performed ritual sacrifices to the Great Serpent, using venom-coated blades to send victims to their god. [PAWN_pronoun] believed each death fed the serpent's power.
LanguageData.FCP_Viper_RitualSlayer.title: Viper ritual slayer
LanguageData.FCP_Viper_ScaleWarrior.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] wore armor decorated with snake scales and fought with serpentine grace. [PAWN_pronoun] believed the spirit of snakes guided [PAWN_possessive] strikes.
LanguageData.FCP_Viper_ScaleWarrior.title: Viper scale warrior
LanguageData.FCP_Viper_ScavengerCult.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] scavenged the wasteland for snake habitats, collecting venom and hunting for food. [PAWN_pronoun] survived by knowing where serpents nested and how to avoid their strikes.
LanguageData.FCP_Viper_ScavengerCult.title: Viper scavenger
LanguageData.FCP_Viper_SerpentGuard.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] protected Viper camps and holy sites from intruders. [PAWN_pronoun] guarded the sacred snakes with deadly devotion, killing anyone who threatened them.
LanguageData.FCP_Viper_SerpentGuard.title: Viper serpent guard
LanguageData.FCP_Viper_SerpentWhisperer.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] claimed to communicate with snakes, understanding their needs and desires. Whether this was true or madness, the Vipers revered [PAWN_objective] as touched by the divine serpent.
LanguageData.FCP_Viper_SerpentWhisperer.title: Viper serpent whisperer
LanguageData.FCP_Viper_SnakeHandler.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] tended to the sacred serpents kept by the Vipers, feeding them and harvesting their venom. [PAWN_pronoun] learned to handle even the deadliest snakes without fear.
LanguageData.FCP_Viper_SnakeHandler.title: Viper snake handler
LanguageData.FCP_Viper_ToxicRaider.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] raided caravans and settlements, spreading the Vipers' toxic influence. [PAWN_pronoun] used poison gas and venomous weapons to incapacitate victims.
LanguageData.FCP_Viper_ToxicRaider.title: Viper toxic raider
LanguageData.FCP_Viper_ToxicShaman.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] served as a spiritual guide for the Vipers, interpreting snake movements as divine messages. [PAWN_pronoun] conducted rituals involving venom consumption and serpent worship.
LanguageData.FCP_Viper_ToxicShaman.title: Viper toxic shaman
LanguageData.FCP_Viper_VenomAddict.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] regularly ingested sEinkaufszentrum doses of snake venom to build immunity. Over time, [PAWN_pronoun] became addicted to the rush, craving the toxin's effects.
LanguageData.FCP_Viper_VenomAddict.title: Viper venom addict
LanguageData.FCP_Viper_VenomBrewer.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] brewed toxins, poisons, and venomous concoctions for the Vipers. [PAWN_pronoun] experimented with different snake venoms to create ever-deadlier mixtures.
LanguageData.FCP_Viper_VenomBrewer.title: Viper venom brewer
LanguageData.FCP_Viper_VenomMaster.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] mastered the art of extracting and weaponizing snake venom. [PAWN_pronoun] coated blades and arrows with deadly toxins, making every wound potentially fatal.
LanguageData.FCP_Viper_VenomMaster.title: Viper venom master
LanguageData.FCP_Viper_VenomWarrior.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] was a frontline fighter for the Vipers, wielding poisoned weapons in close combat. [PAWN_pronoun] reveled in watching enemies succumb to venom after the battle ended.
LanguageData.FCP_Viper_VenomWarrior.title: Viper venom warrior
